posts.author: indigochild369 (Indigo Child)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

I’m developing an App for Monday.com using the monday.com app SDK. I have the premium feature on my account to allow for Work Schedules where I can assign hour capacities to teams, however I would like to use that data in my app (specifically calculating total hour capacities for teams). From what I can tell this information is not exposed anywhere by the API and I realize that the Work Schedule feature is in beta and that may be the reason why. I’ve attached a photo below to show what exactly I’m talking about.

If anyone could confirm that the Work Schedule hours are not accessible via the API that’d be great or if it is available how I can go about accessing it.

image1683×953 46.8 KB

Thanks!
